name: Anita Sharma
quote: Disha didn't just teach me business — it gave me the confidence to believe I belong in the room.
story: Anita came to the bootcamp as a homemaker with a small tailoring business. After 6 weeks, she launched a sustainable fashion label now selling across 3 states.
outcome: Revenue grew 4x. Now employs 5 women from her community.

name: Rahul Verma
quote: The mentorship I received helped me clear my college interviews and secure a scholarship.
story: Rahul was a bright student lacking guidance. Through the Ignite program, he received one-on-one mentorship that helped him navigate college applications.
outcome: Secured a full scholarship at Delhi University.

name: Meera Iyer
quote: After a 5-year break, I thought my career was over. Disha gave me the upskilling I needed.
story: Meera had taken a career break to raise her children. The empowerment program helped her refresh her tech skills and rebuilt her confidence for interviews.
outcome: Hired as a Senior Analyst at a top tech firm.

name: Siddharth Patel
quote: They showed me that a great idea is nothing without financial discipline and a solid roadmap.
story: Siddharth had a brilliant idea for agritech but no business acumen. Disha's mentors helped him build a scalable business model and secure his first round of seed funding.
outcome: Raised $50k in seed funding for his startup.
